anv-√ās to take a seat subsequently;
to be seated at or near or round (with acc.);
to live in the proximity of (with gen.),  Hcat. ;
to be engaged in (especially in a religious act).

results.rendered_html:
anvās 2 A.
1 To be seated near
(pb) or round; sakhāyamanvāste  Mb. ; to wait upon, serve, attend upon; sakhībhyāmanvāsyate  Ś. 3 ; anvāsitamaruṃdhatyā svāhayeva havirbhujaṃ  R. 1. 56 ; to sit after one (acc. of person); tāṃ anvāsya  R. 2. 24. 
2 To perform, as a religious ceremony; saṃdhyāmanvāsya paścimāṃ  Rām.
